creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 145816
sysutils/ansible 1.7 -> 1.7.1

Please update sysutils/ansible to 1.7.1.
This is a security and bugfix release.

Changes: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ansible/ansible/v1.7.1/CHANGELOG.md

The patch also adds USES=python support.

Important: this includes changes from Bugzilla 192536.
